meta.title: BoatExperts — Certified Marine Technicians, On Demand
meta.description: BoatExperts connects boat owners with certified marine technicians for free virtual consultations. Whether you're commissioning for spring, upgrading electronics, or diagnosing a problem — we help you get it right.

hero.headline: Expert help for whatever your boat needs.
hero.subheadline: BoatExperts connects you with certified marine technicians for free virtual consultations. Get the right advice, the right parts list, and the confidence to get it done.

services.headline: What we help with
services.subheadline: Pick the service that matches where you're at. Each one pairs you with a specialist who knows that specific job inside and out.

items.title: Spring Commissioning
items.body: Getting your boat back in the water after winter? Don't guess. Our techs walk you through every step and send you a personalised parts list before you splash.

items.title: Electronics Upgrades
items.body: Thinking about a new chartplotter, autopilot, or VHF? Talk to a tech before you buy. We'll tell you exactly what's compatible with your boat — and what to skip.

items.title: Diagnostics & Troubleshooting
items.body: Boat acting up and you're not sure why? Describe the problem to one of our techs and we'll help you figure out what's wrong before you spend money on a guess.

about.headline: Real technicians. Not a chatbot.
about.body:
BoatExperts was built because getting good marine advice is harder than it should be. Forums are full of contradictions. Dealers upsell. YouTube only gets you so far.

Every consultation is with a certified marine technician — someone who has physically worked on boats like yours, in conditions like yours. We match you based on your engine type, hull, and the specific job you're doing.

The consultation is free because we make money when you buy the parts and gear your tech recommends. You get honest advice. We point you to the right products. Everyone wins.

stats.label: Average time from booking to call

items.quote: I've been launching the same boat for six years and still learned three things I'd been doing wrong. Caught a cracked impeller housing before it became a tow bill.
items.name: Dave Kowalski

items.quote: I had a Garmin chartplotter in my cart and was about to check out. My tech talked me out of it — wrong transducer for my hull. Saved me $400 and a return headache.
items.name: Chris Flanagan

items.quote: First season with a new-to-me boat. Had no idea where to start. My tech walked me through everything in 45 minutes. Splashed two days later without a single issue.
items.name: Tom Briggs

cta_band.headline: Not sure where to start?
cta_band.subheadline: Tell us about your boat and what you're trying to do. We'll point you in the right direction — no commitment required.
cta_band.cta_text: Talk to a tech for free
